seoTitle: Riverside Unified School District Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: View the Riverside Unified Calendar 2026-2027 with first day of school, RUSD holidays, Winter Recess, Spring Recess, final grade-level dates, PDF and calendar download.
calendarNotes: Riverside Unified classes begin on August 10, 2026. The calendar lists May 26, 2027 as the end of high school and 7th grade, and May 27, 2027 as the end of elementary and 8th grade and the last day for teachers.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Riverside Unified start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Classes begin on Monday, August 10, 2026. The first day for 7th grade is Friday, August 7, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Riverside Unified Spring Recess in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess runs Monday, March 29 through Friday, April 2, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Riverside Unified in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: High school and 7th grade end May 26, 2027. Elementary and 8th grade end May 27, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: Does Riverside Unified have the same calendar for all schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Most districtwide dates are shared, but individual schools may have additional events, minimum days, conference schedules, or site-level adjustments. Families should confirm campus-specific dates with their school.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days are in Riverside Unified 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The Riverside Unified 2026-2027 traditional calendar includes 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: Where can I download the Riverside Unified calendar PDF?
calendarFaqs.a: Families can view the official Riverside Unified calendar PDF from this page or download the calendar file provided by MySchoolDates for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.

customSections.label: Parent Planning Guide for Riverside Unified 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families can use the Riverside Unified 2026-2027 calendar to plan vacations, childcare, transportation, school supplies, conference schedules, and end-of-year activities around specific school-year checkpoints.

groups.label: Late July-Early August preparation
items: Review enrollment updates, school supply lists, transportation details, and campus-specific schedules before the first instructional week.
Families with incoming 7th grade students should note the separate first day listed on the district calendar.
Confirm registration deadlines and orientation information directly with the assigned school.

groups.label: When should Riverside Unified families plan vacations?
items: Families should confirm campus events, athletics, testing, and childcare needs before booking travel.

groups.label: December planning
items: Check the final attendance dates before Winter Recess.
Confirm childcare coverage for the full recess window.
Review the January return date before scheduling travel.

groups.label: When should parents prepare for the first day?
items: The first day for 7th grade is August 7, 2026.
Check school-specific requirements, transportation details, supplies, and registration deadlines before the first instructional week.

groups.label: Are all students dismissed on the same final day?
items: High school and 7th grade end May 26, 2027.
The grade-level end dates matter for childcare, transportation, graduation-related events, and family travel planning.

yearNumbers.label: Academic Structure
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar follows a traditional school-year schedule with district holidays, recess periods, and grade-level ending dates.

yearNumbers.label: Grade-Level Planning
yearNumbers.detail: Families should check whether an end date applies to high school, 7th grade, elementary, or 8th grade.

yearNumbers.label: Calendar Scope
yearNumbers.detail: The calendar covers districtwide dates, while campus events, testing windows, and activity schedules may vary by school.
